'''Marngar III''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="Journal4" /> located in the [[Marngar system/Legends|Marngar system]]. It was a part of the [[Arrowhead]], or [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Marngar III was affiliated with the Empire and was the site of the [[Imperial University of Marngar III]]. That establishment was attended by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Benald Orlan]] from<ref name="Journal4" /> the Core Worlds<ref name="TEA Quian">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Quian system/Legends|Quian system]]</ref> astronomical object [[Quian]], a fact that was later noted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] in an entry of the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]''<ref name="Journal4" />—the initial version of which was published in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="7 ABY">{{JournalCite|1|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} establishes that the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' represents an [[in-universe]] update to the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', the original version of which is presented in the sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]. The latter work is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref>—dedicated to Orlan.<ref name="Journal4" />

==Behind the scenes==
Marngar III was mentioned in the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the [[November]] [[1994]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|fourth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. The segment was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]].<ref name="Journal4" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Marngar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Marngar III, in grid square M-10.<ref name="TEA" />
